title: Richly Spiced Moroccan Frankfurter Rfissa
description: A winey, molten, festive Moroccan dish featuring frankfurter, blanch, and vegan-friendly ingredients, formed into a rfissa.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced vegan frankfurter and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the ground cumin, smoked paprika, and ground cayenne pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the low sodium vegetable broth and dry red wine to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Uncover the skillet and simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the liquid has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Serve the richly spiced Moroccan frankfurter rfissa hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
